## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, new drafts, and initial SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The first blog post is indexed and ranking on page one for 28 queries (avg. position 8), a strong early signal of content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [CD's technical draft ("Escaping LLM Collapse") will be repurposed: published separately for a dev audience and used as source material for trust-building, layman's articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Michael's LinkedIn series outline will be used for new topic ideation, not as a prescriptive content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Content publishing is unblocked via an HTML conversion method for tables; 3 new articles are staged for review.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Indexing

  - [**Initial Success:** The first published article, "Business Trip Planning Strategies," is indexed and ranking on page one.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [**Avg. Position:** 8](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Queries:** Ranks for 28 relevant queries, including "top solutions for planning business trips" (position 4.2).](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [**Action:** Add internal links to all new posts to accelerate discovery and indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**Context:** Google's ranking algorithm is volatile for the first \~4 weeks post-indexing as it monitors CTR and user engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [**Technical Draft ("Escaping LLM Collapse"):**](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [**Problem:** Draft is too technical and off-strategy for the primary SEO audience.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [**Solution 1 (Publishing):** Publish as a separate "Company News" or "Tech" section for a developer audience (discovery via LinkedIn).](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [**Solution 2 (Repurposing):** Use as source material for layman's articles explaining Otto's tech to build trust and differentiate it from generic LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**LinkedIn Series Outline:**](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Use as a non-prescriptive source for new topic ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [**Examples:** "Difference between fair classes," "Business class products," "Seat selection."](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)

### Content Production & Workflow

  - [**New Articles:** 3 more articles will be staged this week; 2 are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Author Attribution:** Alternate between Michael and CD for new posts.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Publishing Tables:** A method was found to publish tables by converting them to HTML using Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Aida will share a link to a test page for mobile validation.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Review Process:** Jason will approve drafts by commenting "approved" directly in the Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Review and approve the 2 ready-for-review articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Develop a plan for the "Company News" or "Tech" blog section.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Share the HTML table test page link for mobile validation.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Monitor indexing status for other published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Stage the 3 new articles for review.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Add internal links to all new content.](https://fathom.video/share/-in91yhwg5QYF84F_W4WqHL4-iyhUDZo?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
